name: Layer Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Layer 1: Cream the Crisco and sugar until smooth. Add the egg yolks and mix well. Gradually add the flour, baking powder, and salt, mixing thoroughly. Fold in the vanilla extract. Pour into a greased pan and spread evenly over the second layer.
Layer 2: Beat the Egg white until stiff peaks form. Gently fold in the brown sugar and vanilla extract. Spread over the first layer and sprinkle with chopped nuts. Bake for 30 minutes at 350°F (175°C). Makes 2 dozen bars or more.
